title: ilex × camelliifolia
intro: Ilex × camelliifolia, also known as the Chinese holly, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the Chinese holly (Ilex perado subsp. ilicifolia) and the camellia holly (Ilex × colungiana). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex × camelliifolia include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Ilex × camelliifolia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
